name: Jangho Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Jangho Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells curtain wall products in worldwide. The company provides various services, including interior decoration, ophthalmology treatment, third-party testing, and community hospitals. It also offers its products and services under the Jangho, Sundart, Gang Yuan, Zeming, Steve Leung Designers, and Vision brands. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
